results.rendered_html:
asūyaka a. [asūy-ṇyul  P. III. 2. 146 ]
1 Envious, detracting, calumnious.
2 Discontented, displeased.
— kaḥ A detractor, an envious man;  Ms. 2. 114 ;  Śānti. 3. 7 ,  Y. 1. 28.
